name: How's permanent disability rated for occupational hearing loss in Riverton?

mainEntity.name: How's permanent disability rated for occupational hearing loss in Riverton?

acceptedAnswer.description: By AMA Guides via doctor exam, percentage based on audiometric thresholds.[9] Utah uses impairment ratings for ODA benefits.[9] Key factors: binaural loss calculation, functional impact. Get rated post-stabilization; determines lifelong pay. Accurate testing essential.
